# WeReact agency

> WeReact is a bilingual (French/English) web design studio based in Marrakech, Morocco. We build fast, credible, SEO-ready websites for local businesses, tourism and hospitality brands, riads, hotels, and service companies across Morocco and beyond.

WeReact designs and develops showcase websites, e-commerce stores, landing pages, and custom tourism/booking websites, with practical SEO foundations (clean structure, metadata, performance, sitemaps) included in every build.

## Pricing

- Showcase website: from 2,000 MAD
- E-commerce website (front-end + back-end included): from 3,500 MAD
- Riad / hotel direct-booking website: custom quote based on scope
- Delivery: 2-3 days for defined-scope showcase sites and landing pages; booking, e-commerce, and complex integration work receives a scoped timeline before work begins
- Free, precise quote sent within one business day

## Services

- Website design in Marrakech: https://www.wereact.agency/en/web-design-marrakech
